labels.analysis: The MCP Server "biz.icecat/mcp" provides 15 tools focused on e-commerce tasks. Core capabilities include various operations. Key tools: product_analytics, product_gallery, product_identifiers, product_leaflet, product_lifecycle.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "E-Commerce" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: product.

tools.description: Retrieves product popularity information based on the total product downloads from Icecat. Use this tool when the user requests product popularity analytics.

brand_name.description: Brand name. Required only with product_code. Ignored if GTIN is present.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number. Overrides brand_name + product_code. Use GTIN exclusively when valid.

product_code.description: Manufacturer product code. Required only with brand_name. Ignored if GTIN is present.

tools.name: product_analytics

popularity.description: The total number of downloads of the product across all types of Icecat output formats (xml, json, live, pcf, csv, www, url). Example: 1250

tools.description: Returns product images.

brand_name.description: Brand name. Required only with product_code. Ignored if GTIN is present.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number. Overrides brand_name + product_code. Use GTIN exclusively when valid.

product_code.description: Manufacturer product code. Required only with brand_name. Ignored if GTIN is present.

tools.name: product_gallery

images.description: List of product images from the gallery sorted by order. Each image contains order, type, main indicator, and URLs for different resolutions. If empty, gallery information is not available for this product.

tools.description: Returns basic product identifiers only. Use only for: brand, code, GTINs, category, family, series, model, title.

brand_name.description: Brand name. Required only with product_code. Ignored if GTIN is present.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number. Overrides brand_name + product_code. Use GTIN exclusively when valid.

product_code.description: Manufacturer product code. Required only with brand_name. Ignored if GTIN is present.

tools.name: product_identifiers

product_code.description: Brand product code

tools.description: Returns product leaflets.

brand_name.description: Brand name. Required only with product_code. Ignored if GTIN is present.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number. Overrides brand_name + product_code. Use GTIN exclusively when valid.

product_code.description: Manufacturer product code. Required only with brand_name. Ignored if GTIN is present.

tools.name: product_leaflet

leaflets.description: List of available product leaflets. Each leaflet includes a direct URL to the PDF document. If no leaflets are available, this will be an empty array.

tools.description: Returns product lifecycle information.

brand_name.description: Brand name. Required only with product_code. Ignored if GTIN is present.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number. Overrides brand_name + product_code. Use GTIN exclusively when valid.

product_code.description: Manufacturer product code. Required only with brand_name. Ignored if GTIN is present.

tools.name: product_lifecycle

tools.description: Returns product manuals.

brand_name.description: Brand name. Required only with product_code. Ignored if GTIN is present.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number. Overrides brand_name + product_code. Use GTIN exclusively when valid.

product_code.description: Manufacturer product code. Required only with brand_name. Ignored if GTIN is present.

tools.name: product_manual

manuals.description: List of available product manuals. Each manual includes a direct URL. If no manuals are available, this will be an empty array.

tools.description: Returns complete aggregated product information. Use only when full or complete product information is explicitly requested.

brand_name.description: Brand name. Required only with product_code. Ignored if GTIN is present.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number. Overrides brand_name + product_code. Use GTIN exclusively when valid.

product_code.description: Manufacturer product code. Required only with brand_name. Ignored if GTIN is present.

tools.name: product_overview

product_code.description: Brand product code

preferred.description: Whether this is a preferred/recommended related product

product_code.description: Product code/part number

bottom_line.description: Short summary or conclusion of the review

comment.description: Short excerpt of the review, maximum 255 characters

url.description: Original source URL where the review was published

tools.description: Returns structured promotional selling points for a product.

brand_name.description: Brand name. Required only with product_code. Ignored if GTIN is present.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number. Overrides brand_name + product_code. Use GTIN exclusively when valid.

product_code.description: Manufacturer product code. Required only with brand_name. Ignored if GTIN is present.

tools.name: product_reasons_to_buy

reasons_to_buy.description: List of structured promotional selling points for the product, sorted by order. If no reasons to buy are available, this will be an empty array.

tools.description: Returns related products for a given product.

brand_name.description: Brand name. Required only with product_code. Ignored if GTIN is present.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number. Overrides brand_name + product_code. Use GTIN exclusively when valid.

product_code.description: Manufacturer product code. Required only with brand_name. Ignored if GTIN is present.

tools.name: product_related

related.description: List of related products. Each item includes category, brand, product code, and model. If no related products are available, this will be an empty array.

preferred.description: Whether this is a preferred/recommended related product

product_code.description: Product code/part number

tools.description: Returns product reviews.

brand_name.description: Brand name. Required only with product_code. Ignored if GTIN is present.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number. Overrides brand_name + product_code. Use GTIN exclusively when valid.

product_code.description: Manufacturer product code. Required only with brand_name. Ignored if GTIN is present.

tools.name: product_review

reviews.description: List of product reviews. Each review includes a comment and optional score, pros, cons, and summary. If no reviews are available, this will be an empty array.

bottom_line.description: Short summary or conclusion of the review

comment.description: Short excerpt of the review, maximum 255 characters

url.description: Original source URL where the review was published

tools.description: Returns safety, compliance, and sustainability documents.

brand_name.description: Brand name. Required only with product_code. Ignored if GTIN is present.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number. Overrides brand_name + product_code. Use GTIN exclusively when valid.

product_code.description: Manufacturer product code. Required only with brand_name. Ignored if GTIN is present.

tools.name: product_safety_docs

documents.description: A list of safety documentation entries available for the product. Each document object includes its type and URL. If no documents are available, this will be an empty array.

tools.description: Returns structured technical specifications. Use only for: detailed features or attributes.

brand_name.description: Brand name. Required only with product_code. Ignored if GTIN is present.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number. Overrides brand_name + product_code. Use GTIN exclusively when valid.

product_code.description: Manufacturer product code. Required only with brand_name. Ignored if GTIN is present.

tools.name: product_specs

groups.description: List of specification groups, each containing related product specifications

tools.description: Returns brand-authored descriptive and marketing text only. Do NOT use for: specs, warranty, identifiers, images.

brand_name.description: Brand name. Required only with product_code. Ignored if GTIN is present.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number. Overrides brand_name + product_code. Use GTIN exclusively when valid.

product_code.description: Manufacturer product code. Required only with brand_name. Ignored if GTIN is present.

tools.name: product_texts

tools.description: Returns product videos.

brand_name.description: Brand name. Required only with product_code. Ignored if GTIN is present.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number. Overrides brand_name + product_code. Use GTIN exclusively when valid.

product_code.description: Manufacturer product code. Required only with brand_name. Ignored if GTIN is present.

tools.name: product_video

videos.description: A list of available product video entries. Each contains the URL and description. If no videos are available, this will contain a message indicating videos are not available for this product.

tools.description: Returns warranty data only.

brand_name.description: Brand name. Required only with product_code. Ignored if GTIN is present.

gtin.description: Global Trade Item Number. Overrides brand_name + product_code. Use GTIN exclusively when valid.

product_code.description: Manufacturer product code. Required only with brand_name. Ignored if GTIN is present.

tools.name: product_warranty
